scripts.frontend:start: sh -c 'if [ -f frontend/package.json ]; then cd frontend && npm start; elif [ -f frontend/build/app.js ]; then node frontend/build/app.js; else echo "No frontend to start"; fi'
scripts.build: sh -c 'if [ -f frontend/package.json ]; then cd frontend && npm run build; else echo "No frontend package.json, skipping build"; fi'
